migrateCommand.signature: handleMigrate(cwd: string, subcommand: string, args: string[]): void
migrateCommand.description: /migrate CLI handler: dispatches detect, is-latest, backup, restore, cleanup subcommands

migrateInfra.description: Deterministic migration infrastructure: version detection heuristics, backup/restore/cleanup

migrateSkill.description: Agent-driven migration skill that analyzes .planning/ state and proposes transformations

rapidVersionField.description: Version field used to detect current version and stamp new version after migration

agentDrivenMigration.description: Migration agent dynamically analyzes .planning/ state against current schemas -- no hardcoded step registry

dryRunSafe.description: --dry-run must show all changes without writing any files

preMigrationBackup.description: Pre-migration backup must be created at .planning/.pre-migrate-backup/ before any changes

latestVersionNoOp.description: Running /migrate when already on latest version must produce clean no-op message
